title: Energy Manager Gen. 1
description: With this function block, surplus energy, which is otherwise fed into the grid, can be used optimally. Up to 12 loads can be controlled.

inputs.description: Must be connected if output (Re) is used.
Pulse: Outputs are reset / switched off. On: Block is locked. Dominating input. The name of the connected sensor is used in the user interface.

outputs.description: Can be used, for example, to charge a battery or a heating element (energy storage). If this output is used, the input (Ps) must be connected.
Intelligent API based connector. API Commands

parameters.description: Only so many consumers are activated that the current power (P) does not exceed this value. 0 = Outputs are activated only with excess energy.
